# GitHub Copilot Poker Server Bible
Use these prompts verbatim as file-level comments (// or /* */). Copilot will autocomplete like a boss.

## 1. Project Skeleton (start every new project with this)
```js
// Full-stack real-time poker server: Node.js + Express + Socket.io + Sequelize (PostgreSQL) + JWT auth
// Folder structure: src/ (auth, controllers, models, routes, sockets, game, utils)
// Features: user registration/login, balance, rooms (lobby/private), real-time actions (bet/raise/call/fold/check/all-in)
// Hand evaluation (poker-eval or custom ranker), blinds/antes, timeouts, showdown
// TypeScript preferred, but JS ok. .env: DB_URL, JWT_SECRET, PORT=4000
// Deps: express, socket.io, sequelize, pg, jsonwebtoken, bcryptjs, dotenv, cors
// Sequelize User model: id (UUID), username (unique string), passwordHash (bcrypt), balance (decimal default 1000), email (optional), createdAt
// Methods: static async register(username, password) → hash + create
// static async login(username, password) → verify + return JWT
// Use bcrypt for hash/verify, jsonwebtoken for sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: '7d' })
// Socket.io server: on connection → authenticate JWT from handshake.auth.token
// Events:
// 'join-room' → validate room exists, add player, broadcast 'player-joined'
// 'leave-room' → remove player, broadcast 'player-left'
// 'action' → { type: 'bet'|'raise'|'call'|'fold'|'check'|'allin', amount? } → validate turn, update pot/stack, broadcast 'action-update'
// 'deal-hand' → private emit cards to player
// 'showdown' → reveal hands, calculate winner(s), update balances
// Use rooms: socket.join(roomId), io.to(roomId).emit()// Poker engine class: constructor(roomId, players[], blinds, startingStack)
// Methods:
// startGame() → shuffle deck, deal 2 cards private, post blinds/antes, set dealer button
// nextRound() → flop/turn/river, broadcast board
// evaluateHand(hand + board) → rank (use poker-eval lib or custom: royal flush → straight flush → quads → full house → flush → straight → trips → two pair → pair → high card)
// handleAction(playerId, action, amount?) → validate legal, update pot/stacks, check all-in, end round if needed
// showdown() → compare ranks, split pot if ties, payout winners
